GeneralDescription.SourceString: All right, people, let's start at the beginning one last time.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: All right, people, let's start at the beginning one last time.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Miles Morales may be missing, but Spider-Gwen won't give up the search. She's determined to find her friend... no matter where he's ended up in the Spider-verse.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Miles Morales may be missing, but Spider-Gwen won't give up the search. She's determined to find her friend... no matter where he's ended up in the Spider-verse.
